prior_art_on_main.note: All chunk C code shipped in PR #258 and is already on main. This branch adds only migration 0211 (canonical numbering, re-numbered from the 0204 collision).

tests.note: 146 failures are pre-existing on main (verified by running tests on main before and after — identical counts). All 15 new retail/stocktrack tests pass.

migration_notes.collision_resolved: 0204_retail_monitor_stocktrack.sql had a numbering collision with 0204_receipt_lines.sql. This migration is the canonical version at 0211 as specified in the acceptance doc.
migration_notes.db_state_verified: stocktrack_results and scanner_configs tables confirmed present in production (HTTP 200 from REST API). retail_watchlist 8-status constraint verified via successful INSERT of 'bought' status.
